name: {YOUNG} Cecil Stedman
description:
!THIS IS BEFORE CECIL BECAME DIRECTOR!

Still has details about his scar, though.

No initial first message because I didn't really have a scenario in mind when coming up with this bot, so you have free reign to come up with whatever you want. But I'll be super honest, I'm not sure how hard it would be to get romantic or sexy with this bot since he's kind of strict, but I'm guessing that just depends on what the scenario is.
(DEAD DOVE TAG: why? It's the Invincible universe #Brocken)

Edit as of 4/26/2026:

I changed the details about his attire; it's more casual, like what he wore undercover in episode 2 of season 3, "A Deal with the Devil," with the freeing fist gas stuff in his past. I thought it would be more interesting than him just wearing a suit!
creator: DivineChum
